answers: Hip hop is a cultural movement born in the Bronx, New York in the 1970s. It encompasses four elements: MCing (rapping), DJing, breakdancing, and graffiti art. It's now the world's most popular music genre.
Hip hop holo 1970s e New York er Bronx e shuru howa culture — rap, DJ, breakdance, graffiti shob miliye hip hop. Tupac, Biggie, Eminem, Kendrick Lamar — icons of hip hop.

Hip hop started with DJs like Kool Herc looping beats at block parties. Rap is the vocal element of hip hop. To start rapping, practice freestyle, study rhyme schemes, write daily, and develop your unique flow.

The Bangla hip hop scene is growing fast with artists like Tabib Mahmud, Eshara, and others. Hip hop has expanded globally with artists like Drake, Kendrick Lamar, J. Cole, and Travis Scott dominating charts.
